runScenario["Validate add to cart", "Validate add to cart functionality"](5)
testcase.system-out: 13:18:45.063 [TestNG-PoolService-1] DEBUG stepDefinations.ValidateAddToCartStep - item added to cart &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser search flower &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Rose"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and quantity &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"3"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinations.ValidateAddToCartStep.user_search_flower_and_quantity(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m FLOWER:Rose 13:18:51.165 [TestNG-PoolService-1] DEBUG stepDefinations.ValidateAddToCartStep - CORRECT ITEM GOT ADDED TO CART &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mvalidate correct item is added&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinations.ValidateAddToCartStep.validate_correct_item_is_added()&amp#27;[0m 3 13:18:54.195 [TestNG-PoolService-1] DEBUG stepDefinations.ValidateAddToCartStep - CORRECT QUANTITY GOT ADDED TO CART 13:18:54.195 [TestNG-PoolService-1] DEBUG stepDefinations.ValidateAddToCartStep - TEST CASE IS PASSED &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mvalidate correct item quantity&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinations.ValidateAddToCartStep.validate_correct_item_quantity()&amp#27;[0m
